dependencies.name: node
dependencies.description: Node.js runtime — required for QMD and npx

dependencies.name: qmd
dependencies.description: Semantic search over markdown files (embedding + vector search)

setup.context: npx @tobilu/qmd context add qmd://knowledge "Personal knowledge base: inbox items (ideas, tasks, notes, reports, processes), projects, people, companies, meeting notes"

mcp.name: qmd
mcp.command: claude mcp add --scope user qmd -- npx @tobilu/qmd mcp

dependencies.name: gh
dependencies.description: GitHub CLI — used for repo operations and PR workflows
